1_1_1.Name: [Y:Twilight Strand]
Tasks: Pick up weapons + gems along the way
Defeat [C:Hillock] — attack + dodge, spam potions freely
[BUILD] Use Rolling Magma + Holy Flame Totem to clear

1_1_town.Name: [Y:Lioneye's Watch]
Tasks: Turn in quest [G:Enemy at the Gate]
[BUILD] buy gem: Rolling Magma, Elemental Proliferation, Combustion
[BUILD] Setup: Rolling Magma + Elem Prolif + Combustion
[BUILD] buy Holy Flame Totem từ Nessa

1_1_3.Name: [Y:The Mud Flats]
Tasks: Kill Rhoas, pick up 3 eggs → place in wall to open way
Tip: Rhoas charge straight — move sideways to dodge

1_1_4_1.Name: [Y:The Submerged Passage]
Tasks: WP back to [Y:Lioneye's Watch] — buy/sell items
From town: WP to [Y:The Coast] → enter [Y:Tidal Island]

1_1_2a.Name: [Y:Tidal Island]
Tasks: Hailrake casts frost/chill — attack + strafe to dodge
Logout to [Y:Lioneye's Watch] — turn in quest

1_1_4_1b.Name: [Y:The Submerged Passage] (2nd time)
Tasks: WP từ town về [Y:The Submerged Passage]
Find way down to [Y:The Flooded Depths] — place [G:Portal]
Tip: Can skip Flooded Depths, return when stronger

1_1_4_0.Name: [Y:The Flooded Depths]
Tasks: Find and defeat [C:The Dweller of the Deep]
Boss in large room, opposite entrance
Hard boss — can return when stronger!

1_1_5.Name: [Y:The Ledge]
Tasks: Tip: After WP, 3 triangular rocks point to exit

1_1_6.Name: [Y:The Climb]
Tasks: [G:Waypoint] near start of zone, slightly off-center
Find gate in wall → [Y:The Lower Prison]

1_1_7_1.Name: [Y:The Lower Prison]
Tasks: take [G:Waypoint] → WP back to town buy [G:Level 8 Gems]
[BUILD] Lv8: Nên có Rolling Magma + Totem setup đầy enough

1_1_7_2.Name: [Y:The Upper Prison]
Tasks: Find hidden [G:Strongbox]: map icon but blocked by wall
Find [G:SWITCH] on pillar near wall → open wall for flask
→ go theo đường dài → quay ngược song song → lên phòng nhỏ
→ Mẹo: Cần SUSTAIN! Chết rồi enter lại — boss KHÔNG reset full HP
[BUILD] Sau Brutus: receive gem support — take Added Lightning Damage

1_1_8.Name: [Y:Prisoner's Gate]
Tasks: Fake gate closed by [C:Piety] at end of main road!
Find hidden path on opposite side, by wall → go deep

1_1_9.Name: [Y:The Ship Graveyard]
Tasks: Find [Y:Ship Graveyard Cave] in middle of zone, near shipwreck
Don't get distracted by other paths — find Cave!

1_1_9a.Name: [Y:Ship Graveyard Cave]
Tasks: Pass through wall behind boss → back to [Y:Ship Graveyard]

1_1_9b.Name: [Y:The Ship Graveyard] (2nd time)
Tasks: Quest [G:The Marooned Mariner] Reward: [G:Passive Skill Point]
Find entrance to [Y:Cavern of Wrath] on wall

1_1_11_1.Name: [Y:Cavern of Wrath]
Tasks: Linear zone — run straight to [Y:Cavern of Anger]

1_1_11_2.Name: [Y:Cavern of Anger]
Tasks: Linear zone → find entrance to [Y:Merveil's Lair] on wall
[BUILD] ĐỔI SANG ABSOLUTION! Lv12+ buy/receive Absolution
[BUILD] Setup: Absolution + Added Lightning + Added Fire
[BUILD] Passive: go thẳng đến Spiritual Command

1_1_12.Name: [Y:Merveil's Lair]
Tasks: DODGE large cyclones touching cave ceiling!
After victory → head North → [Y:The Southern Forest] (Act 2)

1_2_1.Name: [Y:The Southern Forest]
Tasks: Find gate in wall → [Y:The Forest Encampment]

1_2_town.Name: [Y:The Forest Encampment]
Tasks: [C:Yeena]: sell gems, potions, jewelry — ID items miễn phí!
Head North from town → [Y:The Old Fields]
[BUILD] buy Shield Charge + Frost Blink để di chuyển
[BUILD] Passive: tiếp tục đến Spiritual Command

1_2_6_1.Name: [Y:Chamber of Sins Level 1]
Tasks: Find stairs down → [Y:Chamber of Sins Level 2]

1_2_6_2.Name: [Y:Chamber of Sins Level 2]
Tasks: Complete [G:Trial of Ascendancy] — opposite side of boss
Find long corridor → boss [C:Fidelitas, the Mourning]
Logout to town → WP to [Y:The Crossroads]
[BUILD] Lv14-15: Check có enough gem support for Absolution

1_2_4.Name: [Y:The Broken Bridge]
Tasks: Kill or help — KILL for Passive Point (recommended)
DON'T FORGET to pick up [G:Kraityn's Amulet]!
Logout to town → WP to [Y:The Crossroads]

1_2_15.Name: [Y:The Fellshrine Ruins]
Tasks: Large zone — FOLLOW THE ROAD, skip all side paths!
Path leads to small cemetery → find entrance to [Y:The Crypt]
SKIP all side doors — only follow main road!

1_2_5_2.Name: [Y:The Crypt Level 2]
Tasks: Pick up [G:Golden Hand] → back to town to turn in quest
Finished NORTH Act 2 → go to end of town into [Y:The Riverways]

1_2_7.Name: [Y:The Riverways]
Tasks: Similar to southern Crossroads — connection hub

1_2_9.Name: [Y:The Western Forest]
Tasks: Follow road to [G:Waypoint] → end of road is [C:Captain Arteri]
Socket Emblem into wall behind camp → quest [G:The Way Forward]
Quest Reward: [G:Passive Skill Point] (turn in at Act 1 Bestel!)
Go back, find torches by road → [C:Alira] camp
Find entrance to [Y:Weaver's Chambers] on opposite wall

1_2_10.Name: [Y:Weaver's Chambers]
Tasks: Linear zone → find entrance to [Y:Weaver's Nest]
[BUILD] Lv16: Absolution clear tốt — Holy Flame Totem hỗ trợ boss

1_2_10a.Name: [Y:Weaver's Nest]
Tasks: Logout to town → WP [Y:Riverways] → head North → [Y:The Wetlands]

1_2_12.Name: [Y:The Wetlands]
Tasks: Head North to find [C:Oak] camp and [G:Waypoint]
Back to town, turn in 3 Amulets → get [G:The Apex]
WP to Wetlands → find entrance to [Y:The Vaal Ruins] on wall

1_2_11.Name: [Y:The Vaal Ruins]
Tasks: Large maze zone — find [G:Ancient Seal] (large purple orb)
Click seal → pass through → find entrance to [Y:The Northern Forest]

1_2_8.Name: [Y:The Northern Forest]
Tasks: (Optional) South: [Y:The Dread Thicket] — first Hideout unlock

1_2_14_2.Name: [Y:The Caverns]
Tasks: Zone dài với nhiều ngõ cụt
Need [G:The Apex] to open door! (from 3 bandits quest)
Head North → stairs up to [Y:Ancient Pyramid]

1_2_14_3.Name: [Y:Ancient Pyramid]
Tasks: Multiple floors — just go up stairs
Top floor: click [G:Altar] in middle → WAIT for boss spawn!
Boss has multiple phases — dodge telegraphed attacks
Boss music is great — turn it up! :D
After victory → northern exit → [Y:The City of Sarn] (Act 3)
[BUILD] Lv20-22: ĐẾN ENDURING BOND — node quan trọng nhất!
[BUILD] Bỏ Unholy Might (1 point) khi đã có Enduring Bond

1_3_1.Name: [Y:The City of Sarn]
Tasks: MUST talk to [C:Clarissa] — bricks if skipped!

1_3_town.Name: [Y:The Sarn Encampment]
Tasks: Tip: Quit to Character Select → rejoin = teleport to town center
[C:Clarissa]: sell gems, potions, jewelry — ID items miễn phí
SKIP Sarn Arena (PvP icon to the North)!
Skull icon = Aspirant's Plaza (return later for Lab)
[BUILD] buy Physical to Lightning Support từ Clarissa/Siosa
[BUILD] Setup new: Absolution + Added Lightning + Added Fire + Phys to Lightning

1_3_2.Name: [Y:The Slums]
Tasks: Linear zone — see locked gate to [Y:Sewers] (return later)

1_3_3_1.Name: [Y:The Crematorium]
Tasks: Back to town → talk to [C:Clarissa] → receive [G:Sewer Keys]

1_3_10_1.Name: [Y:The Sewers]
Tasks: SKIP Cassia (league content) and Hideout icon!
Go to end of zone → [Y:The Marketplace]

1_3_5.Name: [Y:The Marketplace]
Tasks: SKIP [G:Ornate Chest] (Swig of Hope quest = waste of time)!
Near WP: enter [Y:The Catacombs] for Trial
Sau Catacombs: go North → bám wall West → [Y:The Battlefront]

1_3_7.Name: [Y:The Battlefront]
Tasks: Hub zone — will return multiple times!
Southwest of WP: find [G:Blackguard Chest] → pick up [G:Ribbon Spool]

1_3_9.Name: [Y:The Docks]
Tasks: SKIP [C:Fairgraves] (Swig of Hope = waste of time)!
Find dock with [G:Supply Container] → pick up [G:Thaumetic Sulphite]
Return to [Y:The Battlefront] → head Northeast → [Y:Solaris Temple]

1_3_8_2.Name: [Y:Solaris Temple Level 2]
Tasks: Follow red carpet → [C:Lady Dialla] at end
Turn in [G:Ribbon Spool] + [G:Thaumetic Sulphite] → receive [G:Infernal Talc]
Take [G:Recipe Altar] in [Y:The Eternal Laboratory] (last room)
WP to [Y:Sewers] → use [G:Infernal Talc] to burn [G:Undying Blockage]

1_3_14_2.Name: [Y:Lunaris Temple Level 2]
Tasks: Longest and hardest zone in Act 3!
Find long bridge + stairs → go up multiple times
CARTS junction: go the path with 1 CART (not 2 carts!)
Pass cage area: blink across gaps
Find golden gate → special room → stairs → Portal boss
Back to town → get book from [C:Grigor]
WP back to [Y:Ebony Barracks] → go NW → [Y:Imperial Gardens]

1_3_17_1.Name: [Y:The Library]
Tasks: Find room with [G:Loose Candle] → open [Y:The Archives]

1_3_17_2.Name: [Y:The Archives]
Tasks: Find 4 [G:Golden Pages] from 4 Book Stands (marked with yellow !)
Back to [C:Siosa] → turn in [G:A Fixture of Fate]
MỞ KHÓA GEM! Quest Reward: [G:Level 31 Gems]
WP to [Y:Imperial Gardens] → NE for Trial

1_3_15a.Name: [Y:Aspirant's Plaza]
Tasks: Enter from Act 3 town (Skull icon) if all 6 Trials done
Normal Labyrinth — Ascend for the first time!
Tip: When lost → go UP and RIGHT
[BUILD] Run Normal Labyrinth — TAKE Radiant Crusade!

1_3_18_2.Name: [Y:Upper Sceptre of God]
Tasks: 3 more floors → wall door leading to Tower Rooftop
When he yells 'A Touch of God' + lightning fist → MOVE BACK!
Phase 2: blood pool SE → STAND CLOSE to boss to avoid corrupted blood
After victory → talk to [C:Lady Dialla] → right exit → [Y:The Aqueduct]

1_4_1.Name: [Y:The Aqueduct]
Tasks: 2 parallel bridges — switch sides when blocked
Long zone — DON'T DIE (respawn at start)!
[BUILD] Farm Aqueduct nếu cần level trước Lab

1_4_town.Name: [Y:Highgate]
Tasks: [C:Petarus & Vanja]: potions, jewelry — ID items miễn phí
[BUILD] XÓA mastery Unholy Might khi có Physical to Lightning!

1_4_2.Name: [Y:The Dried Lake]
Tasks: Back to town → click [G:Deshret's Seal] north of town → open [Y:The Mines]

1_4_3_2.Name: [Y:The Mines Level 2]
Tasks: Follow cart track — find yellow ! = [G:Deshret's Spirit]

1_4_3_3.Name: [Y:Crystal Veins]
Tasks: Long zone — follow road to [G:Waypoint] + [C:Lady Dialla]
SKIP hideout unlock and random bosses!
Enter [Y:Kaom's Dream] (left) → get Eye of Fury
Enter [Y:Daresso's Dream] (right) → get Eye of Desire

1_4_4_1.Name: [Y:Kaom's Dream]
Tasks: Go all the way RIGHT → up stairs → all the way LEFT

1_4_4_3.Name: [Y:Kaom's Stronghold]
Tasks: Hug LEFT wall → head North → Caldera of the King
BOSS: [C:King Kaom] — telegraphed attacks, easy to dodge

1_4_5_1.Name: [Y:Daresso's Dream]
Tasks: Closed gate → kill waves to open

1_4_5_2.Name: [Y:The Grand Arena]
Tasks: Passageways + Arenas — exit always to the North
WP to [Y:Crystal Veins] → turn in 2 Eyes to Dialla → open [Y:Belly of the Beast]

1_4_6_1.Name: [Y:Belly of the Beast Level 1]
Tasks: PREPARE! Long chain until Act 4 final boss starting here
Linear zone — head North-Center → wall path → Level 2

1_4_6_2.Name: [Y:Belly of the Beast Level 2]
Tasks: Head North + LEFT → [Y:Bowels of the Beast]
Tip: DODGE rotating laser! Walk/blink around boss

1_4_6_3.Name: [Y:The Harvest]
Tasks: Go around zone to defeat 3 bosses:
Turn in 3 items to Piety → open [Y:The Black Core]

1_4_6_4.Name: [Y:The Black Core]
Tasks: See sweep ray → run behind boss!
Phase 2: [Y:The Black Heart] — destroy Hearts in 4 corners
Boss phases every 25% HP → kill hearts → continue

1_5_1.Name: [Y:The Slave Pens]
Tasks: Large zone — hug FAR RIGHT, go down to bottom right corner

1_5_town.Name: [Y:Overseer's Tower]
Tasks: Smallest town in the game! Only 3 NPCs

1_5_2.Name: [Y:The Control Blocks]
Tasks: Tip: use blink through fence gaps to save time!
Defeat [C:Justicar Casticus] → pick up [G:Eyes of Zeal]

1_5_3.Name: [Y:Oriath Square]
Tasks: Hub zone — will return multiple times!
First time: follow road through square → East bridge

1_5_4.Name: [Y:The Templar Courts]
Tasks: EAST → hug wall → SOUTH → corner → WEST → NORTH

1_5_5.Name: [Y:Chamber of Innocence]
Tasks: 'I am the end' = AOE explosion → RUN AWAY!
'I' = tracking beam → circle around boss to dodge
Talk to [C:Sin] → RIGHT exit → back to zone
[BUILD] Absolution + Phys to Lightning clear rất tốt ở đây

1_5_3b.Name: [Y:Ruined Square]
Tasks: 4) [Y:Cathedral Rooftop] (opposite corner, same side as WP)

1_5_6.Name: [Y:The Ossuary]
Tasks: go vòng tròn — Find [G:Sign of Purity] từ Tomb

1_5_7.Name: [Y:The Reliquary]
Tasks: Find 3 quest items: [G:Hinekora's Hair], [G:Tukohama's Tooth], [G:Valako's Jaw]
Back to town, turn in quests → WP [Y:Ruined Square] → [Y:Cathedral Rooftop]

1_5_8.Name: [Y:Cathedral Rooftop]
Tasks: Large but linear zone — turn left → head North
Death = spawn right outside → enter and continue!
After boss → talk to [C:Sin] → go down → talk to [C:Lilly Roth]
[BUILD] After Kitava Act 5: -30% all resist! Kiểm tra resist ngay
[BUILD] Ưu tiên gear có Life + Resistance

2_6_town.Name: [Y:Lioneye's Watch] (Act 6)
Tasks: Similar to Act 1 town! additional [C:Faustus] for Currency Exchange

[BUILD] Lilly Roth sell ALL gem — buy gem missing!
[BUILD] buy: Summon Stone Golem + Feeding Frenzy (use from Lv45)

2_6_1.Name: [Y:Twilight Strand] (Act 6)
Tasks: kill HẾT quái trong zone! (đếm ngược khi còn ≤5)
Quest [G:Fallen from Grace] → mở khóa ALL gems!
Quest Reward: [G:Passive Respec Points + All Gems]
back to town → talk to [C:Lilly Roth] → buy gems → North → [Y:The Coast]

2_6_2.Name: [Y:The Coast] (Act 6)
Tasks: Layout Similar to Act 1 — go NE đến [G:Waypoint]

2_6_4.Name: [Y:The Mud Flats] (Act 6)
Tasks: go East → Find [C:The Dishonoured Queen] (nhà hỏng bám wall North)
Defeat Queen, pick up [G:Eye of Conquest]

2_6_5.Name: [Y:Karui Fortress]
Tasks: Zone hình tròn bao quanh Fortress — Find cửa enter bên trong
Né slam telegraphed — 50% HP spawn 3 totems → kill totems
Sau phase có tia xoay quanh — NÉ tia!
talk to [C:Sin] → chọn Pantheon Minor → go NE → [Y:The Ridge]

2_6_7_1.Name: [Y:Lower Prison] (Act 6)
Tasks: [G:Trial of Ascendancy] — thường phía South từ WP

2_6_7_2.Name: [Y:Shavronne's Tower]
Tasks: 4 tầng tower — stairs near lối enter
Tầng 4: cầu thang giữa zone → Prison Rooftop
talk to [C:Sin] → trái → Warden's Chambers → [Y:Prisoner's Gate]

2_6_8.Name: [Y:Prisoner's Gate] (Act 6)
Tasks: 2) Đối diện (North) → [Y:Valley of the Fire Drinker]
3) Quay lại → đối diện Valley → [Y:The Western Forest]

2_6_8a.Name: [Y:Valley of the Fire Drinker]
Tasks: Phase giữa = chuyển zone → go qua mid-zone → final arena
talk to [C:Sin] → Pantheon → về Prisoner's Gate → [Y:Western Forest]

2_6_9.Name: [Y:The Western Forest] (Act 6)
Tasks: take [G:Crafting Altar] ở camp Alira cũ (Find đuốc bên đường)

2_6_10.Name: [Y:The Riverways] (Act 6)
Tasks: Find 2 cột có thanh sắt → đường phụ → [Y:The Wetlands]
Sau Wetlands: về WP → go North + East → [Y:The Southern Forest]

2_6_11.Name: [Y:The Wetlands] (Act 6)
Tasks: go North bám wall núi → [Y:Spawning Ground]
Boss respawn ở trên giữa — additional CHAOS damage!

2_6_12.Name: [Y:The Southern Forest] (Act 6)
Tasks: Zone lớn khó go — Find cầu gỗ hẹp nối các đảo
Đôi khi phải quay lại đường song song
Cuối cùng đến góc East → [G:Waypoint] → [Y:Cavern of Anger]

2_6_13.Name: [Y:Cavern of Anger] (Act 6)
Tasks: Đường giữa → pick up [G:The Black Flag]

2_6_14.Name: [Y:The Beacon]
Tasks: Zone rất lớn — Find bờ biển, bám theo nó!
Find 2 vòng tròn + cột → ĐỨNG TRONG vòng for cột di chuyển
go xuống thung lũng → talk to [C:Weylam Roth] → sail away

2_6_15.Name: [Y:Brine King's Reef]
Tasks: Zone walkthrough lớn — bám border Find lối enter Brine King's Throne
ĐỨNG SAU boss + ĐỪNG đứng quá near!
Phases: wall nước dâng lên — né whirlpool trắng trên đất!
talk to [C:Sin] → Soul of Brine King (freeze immunity!)

2_7_1.Name: [Y:Broken Bridge] (Act 7)
Tasks: ((Optional)) Find [G:Dirty Lockbox] → [G:Silver Locket] for flask reward

2_7_3.Name: [Y:Fellshrine Ruins] (Act 7)
Tasks: Similar to Act 2 — go THEO ĐƯỜNG, SKIP distractions!
Qua cổng vòm → nghĩa trang → [Y:The Crypt]

2_7_4.Name: [Y:The Crypt] (Act 7)
Tasks: Hoàn thành [G:Trial of Ascendancy] + take [G:Crafting Altar]
Find [G:Sarcophagus] trên minimap → enter phòng bí mật
Find [G:Container of Sins] → pick up [G:Maligaro's Map]
WP back to [Y:Crossroads] → North + West → [Y:Chamber of Sins]

2_7_5_1.Name: [Y:Chamber of Sins Level 1] (Act 7)
Tasks: go hướng giữa zone → Find nhiều icons trên minimap
talk to chuyện [C:Silk] → kích hoạt [G:Map Device] với [G:Maligaro's Map]

2_7_5_map.Name: [Y:Maligaro's Sanctum]
Tasks: Hoạt động như Map endgame! 6 portals — chết = mất portal
go TRÁI → cầu hẹp → North bám wall → cầu hẹp tiếp
pick up [G:Black Venom] → về [C:Silk] → receive [G:Obsidian Key]

2_7_5_2.Name: [Y:Chamber of Sins Level 2] (Act 7)
Tasks: Hoàn thành [G:Trial of Ascendancy] (trial cuối for Lab tiếp!)
Find hành lang dài → ! vàng = [G:Secret Passage]
Có thể chạy Aspirant's Plaza ngay từ WP interface!

2_7_7.Name: [Y:Ashen Fields]
Tasks: Defeat [C:Greust, Lord of the Forest] ở Fortress Encampment
talk to [C:Sin] → Pantheon → go North → [Y:Northern Forest]
[BUILD] Chạy Cruel Labyrinth — take Unwavering Crusade!
[BUILD] Ascendancy 3+4: Elemental Relics buff damage for Sentinels
[BUILD] additional Stone Golem + Feeding Frenzy enter setup

2_7_8.Name: [Y:Northern Forest] (Act 7)
Tasks: go NW → Find [Y:Dread Thicket] (quest ở đây!)
Sau Dread Thicket → tiếp tục → [Y:The Causeway]

2_7_9.Name: [Y:Dread Thicket] (Act 7)
Tasks: enter [Y:Den of Despair] → boss [C:Gruthkul, Mother of Despair]
Thu thập enough Fireflies → về [Y:Northern Forest] → [Y:Causeway]

2_7_10.Name: [Y:The Causeway]
Tasks: near exit: Find [G:Kishara's Lockbox] → pick up [G:Kishara's Star]

2_7_11.Name: [Y:Vaal City]
Tasks: Zone lớn — go North + West phía trên giữa
talk to [C:Yeena] → mở cửa [Y:Temple of Decay] (cần 7 Fireflies!)

2_7_12_1.Name: [Y:Temple of Decay Level 1]
Tasks: Nhiều tầng — mỗi tầng Find góc ĐỐI DIỆN để go xuống

2_7_12_2.Name: [Y:Temple of Decay Level 2]
Tasks: Tiếp tục quy tắc góc đối diện
Tầng 2 xuống: Find [G:Crafting Altar] ở giữa zone
Tầng cuối: wall chuyển TÍM → [Y:Arakaali's Web]
Phase đầu: tia tím matrix → NÉ! Phases ở các góc
50% HP: ăn Silk → hồi máu → phase new
Phase cuối: đĩa tím bay = RẤT NGUY HIỂM!

2_8_1.Name: [Y:The Sarn Ramparts]
Tasks: go East dọc wall → lên cầu thang lên đỉnh wall
Quay ngược West trên wall → xuống cầu thang

2_8_2_1.Name: [Y:The Toxic Conduits]
Tasks: Linear zone — chọn 1 hướng theo đến cửa
CẨN THẬN Chaos Damage ở đây!

2_8_2_2.Name: [Y:Doedre's Cesspool]
Tasks: Theo conduits → Find cổng mở → xuống [Y:The Cauldron]
go North qua Sewer Outlet → ngã tư:

2_8_8.Name: [Y:The Quay]

1) Find [G:Sealed Casket] → pick up [G:Ankh of Eternity] TRƯỚC!
Casket thường qua cầu hẹp ngắn
2) Find [Y:Resurrection Site] (lối enter zone) → talk to [C:Clarissa] → kill army
3) Find [Y:The Grain Gate] (đối diện Resurrection Site)

2_8_9.Name: [Y:The Grain Gate]
Tasks: Xen kẽ phòng trong + sân ngoài
Sân ngoài thứ 2: go NW → [C:Gemling Legionnaires] → Defeat

2_8_10.Name: [Y:The Imperial Fields]
Tasks: Theo đường → Find sân tượng → [Y:Solaris Temple Level 1]

2_8_12_1.Name: [Y:Solaris Temple Level 1] (Act 8)
Tasks: Theo carpet path — SKIP Solaris Concourse!

2_8_12_2.Name: [Y:Solaris Temple Level 2] (Act 8)
Tasks: Dawn có 4 moves telegraphed rõ ràng — dễ né
WP back to Doedre's Cesspool → go SW → [Y:Grand Promenade]

2_8_3.Name: [Y:The Grand Promenade]
Tasks: Phòng lớn đầu → chỉ 1 hướng ra → theo đó

2_8_5.Name: [Y:The Bath House]
Tasks: 1) ((Optional)) North → kill [C:Hector Titucius] → [G:Wings of Vastiri] → Jewel

2_8_4.Name: [Y:The High Gardens]
Tasks: Semi-circle lớn — quái RẤT MẠNH! Chết = chạy lại!
go nhanh + an toàn → cuối zone = [Y:Pools of Terror]
Attack mạnh + cold pools/blobs — 2 lần phase spawn reflections

2_8_6.Name: [Y:Lunaris Concourse]
Tasks: Sau Temple: về WP → East → [Y:Harbour Bridge]

2_8_7_1_.Name: [Y:Lunaris Temple Level 1] (Act 8)
